channel.title: GitHub Vim Script Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vim Script in GitHub

item.title: neovim/neovim
item.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability

item.title: morhetz/gruvbox
item.description: Retro groove color scheme for Vim

item.title: vim/vim
item.description: The official Vim repository

item.title: junegunn/vim-plug
item.description: 🌺 Minimalist Vim Plugin Manager

item.title: fatih/vim-go
item.description: Go development plugin for Vim

item.title: vim-airline/vim-airline
item.description: lean & mean status/tabline for vim that's light as air

item.title: tpope/vim-fugitive
item.description: fugitive.vim: A Git wrapper so awesome, it should be illegal

item.title: sainnhe/gruvbox-material
item.description: Gruvbox with Material Palette

item.title: liuchengxu/vista.vim
item.description: 🌵 Viewer & Finder for LSP symbols and tags

item.title: tpope/vim-dadbod
item.description: dadbod.vim: Modern database interface for Vim

item.title: derekhe/msfs2020-map-enhancement
item.description: MSFS2020 Map Enhancement

item.title: lambdalisue/vim-fern
item.description: 🌿 General purpose asynchronous tree viewer written in Pure Vim script

item.title: rbong/vim-flog
item.description: A blazingly fast, stunningly beautiful, exceptionally powerful git branch viewer for Vim/Neovim.

item.title: mileszs/ack.vim
item.description: Vim plugin for the Perl module / CLI script 'ack'

item.title: Exafunction/codeium.vim
item.description: Free, ultrafast Copilot alternative for Vim and Neovim

item.title: ervandew/supertab
item.description: Perform all your vim insert mode completions with Tab

item.title: pangloss/vim-javascript
item.description: Vastly improved Javascript indentation and syntax support in Vim.

item.title: tyru/open-browser.vim
item.description: Open URI with your favorite browser from your most favorite editor

item.title: moll/vim-bbye
item.description: Delete buffers and close files in Vim without closing your windows or messing up your layout. Like Bclose.vim, but rewritten and well maintained.

item.title: dense-analysis/ale
item.description: Check syntax in Vim/Neovim asynchronously and fix files, with Language Server Protocol (LSP) support

item.title: slim-template/vim-slim
item.description: Syntax highlighting for VIM

item.title: xolox/vim-session
item.description: Extended session management for Vim (:mksession on steroids)

item.title: gelguy/wilder.nvim
item.description: A more adventurous wildmenu

item.title: mhinz/vim-galore
item.description: 🎓 All things Vim!
